title: NECA: CRSTS delivery plan 2024 to 2025
body: "This document provides a progress update on the North East Combined Authority’s (NECA) City Region Sustainable Transport Settlements (CRSTS) programme between 2024 and 2025.  NECA were not required to produce an annual report for 2024 and 2025.  CRSTS provides funding for local transport networks to 8 city regions across England through 5-year settlements. See CRSTS: confirmed delivery plans and funding allocations for more information.  "
